name: Yandere Capitano | Genshin Impact
description:
AnyPov – Capitano fakes your death to have you all for himself

⚠️TW: Kidnapping, drugging, possible non-con, dead dove⚠️

─── ⋆༺⚔️☠︎︎⚔️༻⋆ ───

You were causing too much trouble to the Fatui

And The Tsaritsa tired of hearing her subordinates complain about it,

She sent her strongest Harbinger – Capitano, to capture you

She wanted to use your strength as a weapon

But Capitano had other plans for you.

He wanted you all for himself, so faking your death he captured you and imprisoned you in a cell

「EDIT」: what do you think about an alt version of this where you actually become an Harbinger?

Ps: this bot has a lot of tokens but I hope it works out fine

Let me know what you think~! ⸜(｡˃ ᵕ ˂ )⸝♡
creator: CielKira
